parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ operations: [{ create: { name: 'Forge-' + $json.businessId + '-' + new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0], advertisingChannelType: 'SEARCH', status: 'PAUSED', campaignBudget: 'customers/CUSTOMER_ID/campaignBudgets/PLACEHOLDER', biddingStrategyType: 'MAXIMIZE_CLICKS' } }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ message: 'CEO Agent: Update content volume targets - ' + new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0], content: Buffer.from('# Content Strategy - Updated by CEO Agent

## Volume Targets
- Blog posts per week: ' + ($json.params.blog_posts_per_week || 3) + '
- Reel scripts per week: ' + ($json.params.reel_scripts_per_week || 2) + '

Last updated: ' + new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0] + ' by CEO Action Executor').toString('base64') }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ source: 'ceo-action-executor', severity: 'question', requiresResponse: true, businessId: $json.businessId, message: 'PRICING CHANGE REQUEST: Update ' + $json.params.plan + ' plan to $' + $json.params.new_price + '/mo. Approve?' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ businessId: $json.params.businessId, businessName: $json.params.businessName, businessDescription: $json.params.businessDescription, category: $json.params.category, source: 'ceo-action-executor' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ source: 'ceo-action-executor', severity: 'critical', businessId: $json.params?.businessId || $json.businessId, message: 'BUSINESS KILLED: ' + ($json.params?.businessName || 'unknown') + ' - Reason: ' + ($json.params?.reason || 'none given') }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ name: 'Forge-' + $json.businessId + '-' + new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0], objective: 'OUTCOME_LEADS', status: 'PAUSED', special_ad_categories: [] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ source: 'ceo-action-executor', severity: 'question', requiresResponse: true, businessId: $json.businessId, message: 'CEO AGENT NEEDS YOUR INPUT:

' + ($json.params?.question || 'No question specified') + '

Context: ' + ($json.params?.context || 'none') + '

Options: ' + JSON.stringify($json.params?.options || []) }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ source: 'ceo-action-executor', severity: 'info', businessId: $('Scale Sending Domains').first().json.businessId, message: $('Scale Sending Domains').first().json.message }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ message: 'CEO Action Executor log - ' + $json.businessId + ' - ' + $json.today, content: Buffer.from($json.logContent).toString('base64') }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ source: 'ceo-action-executor', severity: 'info', businessId: $json.businessId, message: 'CEO Action Executor Summary (' + $json.totalActions + ' actions, ' + $json.successCount + ' succeeded):\n\n' + $json.summary }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, businessId: $json.businessId, actionsExecuted: $json.totalActions, successCount: $json.successCount }) }}
